zh.title: 火星男孩预言全集 - 波力斯卡关于火星文明与地球未来的预言与验证 | Boriska Prophecies
zh.description: 俄罗斯火星男孩波力斯卡（Boris Kipriyanovich，1996年生）声称拥有火星前世记忆，2004年起引发媒体广泛关注。预言涉及火星文明、狮身人面像秘密、地球灾难、灵性进化等领域。本站收录其主要预言并进行验证分析。

en.title: Boriska Prophecies - Mars Boy's Predictions on Martian Civilization & Earth's Future | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Russian 'Mars Boy' Boris Kipriyanovich (born 1996) claims to remember a past life on Mars. Since 2004, his statements about Martian civilization, the Great Sphinx, Earth's dangers, and spiritual evolution have attracted worldwide attention. Full archive with verification.
